sub_modules.fp_adder_unpack: Extracts IEEE-754 sign, exponent, fraction, significand, and special classification bits.
sub_modules.fp_adder_special: Handles NaN, infinity, zero, signed-zero, and effective subtraction sign cases.
sub_modules.fp_adder_align: Compares operand magnitudes, selects the larger significand, aligns the smaller significand, and computes the effective add/sub operation.
sub_modules.fp_adder_addsub: Adds or subtracts aligned significands and detects exact cancellation to zero.
sub_modules.fp_adder_normalize_round: Normalizes the arithmetic result, applies round-to-nearest-even, detects overflow/underflow, and packs IEEE-754 output.
